# Douglas Mitchell

> Operations Analyst, AI Practitioner, Systems Architect, and Author building systems at the intersection of technology and human potential.

## About

Douglas Mitchell is an Operations Analyst, AI Practitioner, and Systems Architect based in Houston, Texas. He specializes in operational efficiency, workflow automation, data-driven decision making, and AI integration. Douglas is also the author of "The Confident Mind," a practical guide to building authentic confidence.

As a photographer, Douglas specializes in architecture and light photography, exploring the interplay between built environments and natural illumination.

## Credentials

- Google AI Professional Certificate
- Anthropic AI Certificate
- Operations Analysis
- Systems Architecture

## Expertise

**Operations:** Process optimization, workflow automation, data analysis
**AI:** LLM integration, intelligent automation, prompt engineering
**Systems:** Architecture design, API development, cloud infrastructure
**Technical:** React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, PostgreSQL

## Services

- Operations Analysis & Optimization
- AI Integration & Automation
- Systems Architecture
- Workflow Design
- Technical Writing

## Published Work

**The Confident Mind:** A Practical Guide to Authentic Confidence - Available on Amazon
